protocol: Full TUAB_PREPROCESSED patient-disjoint train/eval split, recording-level frozen probe.
notes: 0-parameter complexity yardstick (pyRiemann channel-cov + AIRM tangent + logistic). Minimal broadband variant: 19-channel covariance of per-channel z-scored 10s windows (diagonal ~ 1, so power-blind) averaged over 16 windows; lands BELOW the random-encoder floor because TUAB abnormality is band-power-driven. NOT comparable to Gemein 2020's filter-bank ~0.86 ACCURACY (different metric, protocol, and features); reported here as balanced accuracy.
